Here's what was implemented:

**Files created/modified:**

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `TicketClassifier.csproj` | Added `Microsoft.ML 4.0.2` |
| `Models/TicketData.cs` | ML.NET input/output model classes |
| `Models/TicketRequest.cs` | API DTOs (request, response, metrics) |
| `Services/TicketClassifierService.cs` | ML pipeline: text featurization + SDCA Maximum Entropy trainer |
| `Program.cs` | Minimal API endpoints + DI registration |

**Endpoints:**

- **`POST /api/ticket/classify`** — Predicts category with confidence scores
  ```json
  {"predictedCategory":"Billing","confidence":{"Technical":0.001,"Billing":0.976,"General":0.023}}
  ```
- **`GET /api/ticket/metrics`** — Returns evaluation metrics (accuracy, log loss, per-class precision/recall)

**ML Pipeline:** Text featurization on Subject + Description, concatenated with Priority, normalized, then classified via SDCA Maximum Entropy multiclass trainer. The model trains at startup from `Data/tickets.csv`.
